C:\Users\moham\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-14.0.0-r7\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\numerical_backend.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\moham\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-14.0.0-r7\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\numerical_backend.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\numerical_backend.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\moham\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-14.0.0-r7\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\numerical_backend.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o numerical_backend.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libnumerical_backend.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\numerical_backend.dir\linkLibs.rsp
